channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Keychron K2 HE Concrete Edition Review: Rock-Solid Typing
item.description: Keychron's K2 HE Concrete Edition sounds like a cute gimmick, but as I discovered, there's a really solid keyboard beyond the absurd choice of materials.

item.title: ‘Backrooms’ Takes You Deeper Inside the Internet’s Most Uncanny Horror Myth
item.description: Kane Parsons was just 16 years old when he created a viral YouTube horror series based on a 4chan meme. Now he’s ready to conquer the big screen.

item.title: The Testaments season 2: release date predictions, cast, plot and everything we know so far about the hit Handmaid's Tale spinoff's return to Hulu and Disney+
item.description: Praise be, The Handmaid's Tale spinoff The Testaments season 2 has already been renewed. Here's everything we know so far, from returning cast to plot predictions.

item.title: How to watch Hull KR vs Wigan Warriors: Free streams, TV channels for Challenge Cup Final 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch Challenge Cup Final 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – with Hull KR vs Wigan Warriors on rugby league's big day at Wembley.

item.title: Google Health has taken over from Fitbit on my phone, but I still don't trust AI enough to talk to me about my health
item.description: The Google Health Coach is an AI-powered assistant ready and waiting to improve your fitness — but is it useful?

item.title: Linux gagne du terrain : Dell et Acer s’y mettent la même semaine
item.description: Dell sort un PC pro sous Ubuntu, Acer dégaine une console de jeu sous Linux, le tout en quelques jours. Le pingouin ne se cache plus dans les serveurs.

item.title: Tello Mobile Plan Review (2026): Low Cost, Reliable Service
item.description: With inflation and gas prices rising, I’m trying to save money wherever I can. I tested Tello’s budget cell phone plan, and for me, it turns out prepaid can be just as good.

item.title: Cybercrime Crew Claims It Hacked Mike Lindell’s MyPillow
item.description: Plus: A ransomware group is now stealing data in person, BusPatrol wants to hand its license plate surveillance data to the cops, and more.

item.title: May full moon: A rare blue ‘micromoon’ will appear in the sky tonight. Here’s the best time to see it
item.description: The moon will appear smaller but no less dazzling as May 2026 comes to a close. If you miss this one, you won’t get another chance for a long time. The rarity of events and celebrations such as milestone birthdays and cosmic happenings makes them special.

item.title: Meta is reportedly working on an AI pendant and more smart glasses
item.description: The company is hoping to sell 10 million wearables in the second half of 2026, according to 'The Information.'

item.title: Votre voiture électrique n’est pas un « gros smartphone » : voici ce qui change vraiment pour la batterie
Quilts Are Better Than Sleeping Bags
item.description: Tired of sleeping like a mummy in a bag? Improve your backcountry sleep and carry less weight with an ultralight quilt.

item.title: Google Health : j’ai utilisé leur meilleur coach santé par IA… sans aucun produit Google
item.description: Avec le lancement de son bracelet Fitbit Air, Google déploie une application Health totalement repensée et dopée à l’IA. La promesse ? Centraliser toutes vos données de santé, même issues d’une montre Garmin ou Samsung. Mais entre théorie et pratique, la réalité est bien plus frustrante.

item.title: Millions of Bees Have Thrived Under a New York Cemetery for More Than a Century
item.description: A walk in the cemetery led to Cornell researchers discovering an underground colony of bees with an estimated population of 5.5 million—one of the largest ever recorded.

item.title: ICYMI: the 8 biggest tech stories of the week, from Oura's new smart ring to the Pope's take on AI
item.description: It's been a frenetic week of tech — here are some of the major stories we published over the past seven days.

item.title: Watch out, Spotify: This free site is a music lover’s dream
item.description: From live music to audiobooks, podcasts, and even radio shows, this on-demand audio treasure trove is one of the internet’s best-kept secrets. These days, music is everywhere. You can call up practically any recorded song at any moment with a quick flick of your favorite fingie and nary an extra cent spent.

item.title: Science says you can indeed buy happiness—for as little as $30
item.description: Clinical studies have proven that you can increase your happiness by spending money on these specific purchases. When I was about 8 years old, in response to the ubiquitous question of what I wanted to be when I grew up, I responded, “I want to be happy!”

item.title: Zillow downgrades its home price forecast across 400-plus housing markets—see the data
item.description: Zillow predicts that national housing affordability may improve slightly as U.S. income growth outpaces U.S. home price growth. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: I tested the best dating apps for women: Find a real connection
item.description: Looking for the best dating apps for women? Get our honest reviews on which apps are actually worth your time.

item.title: Do You Actually Need to Pay for Transcription Software?
item.description: I tested Wispr Flow and various AI-powered transcription software to see whether you should bother subscribing or stick with free services.

item.title: The 6 best open earbuds stay put, sound great, and keep us aware of the world
item.description: We put the best open-ear headphones and earbuds to the test. Compare the popular Bose Ultra Open with Shokz OpenFit Pro, Sony LinkBuds Clip, and more.
